tasks.name: Create dashboard.json i18n file with widget translation keys
tasks.purpose: Define all widget title and description translation keys for internationalization support

constraints: Must include keys for all 7 widgets
Follow existing i18n naming patterns
Include title, description, and empty state keys

tasks.output_state: File apps/web/public/locales/en/dashboard.json exists with translation keys for courseProgress, spiderChart, kanbanSummary, activityFeed, quickActions, coachingSessions, presentationsTable widgets
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File contains valid JSON with nested objects for each widget, includes title, description, and emptyState keys, follows project i18n conventions

tasks.name: Create DashboardGrid component with responsive Tailwind grid structure
tasks.purpose: Create main grid orchestrator component that distributes DashboardData to all 7 widget placeholders with responsive breakpoints

constraints: Use 'use client' directive
Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3
Gap spacing: gap-4
Include animate-in fade-in animation
Bottom padding: pb-36

tasks.input_state: DashboardData type exists from F1, i18n keys defined
tasks.output_state: File apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/dashboard-grid.tsx exists with client component accepting DashboardData prop, renders 3-row grid with 7 widget component imports (placeholders)
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component accepts DashboardData prop, renders responsive grid with correct breakpoints, includes all 7 widget components as children, uses gap-4 spacing, compiles without errors
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && grep -E '(use client|grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3|gap-4)' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/dashboard-grid.tsx
